channel.title: ufw on Martin Proks (@mproksik)
channel.description: Recent content in ufw on Martin Proks (@mproksik)

item.title: Converting RP to NAS, sort off
item.description: Approximately two years ago I've been playing around with an idea of purchasing a NAS (Network attached storage). As a student looking at the prices, I've decided to make my own budget one. How hard can it right? I saw some Youtube videos where people were building NAS using Raspberry Pi (RP). So I've started digging for some Pi machine. I ended up choosing between Banana Pi (BP) and RP 2.
